summary: First test run for TubeKit MVP. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests passed (auth, protected endpoints w/o token, SEO TR+EN, ideas TR+EN, thumbnail save w/ and w/o data: prefix, thumbnail list, AI thumbnail generation, dashboard stats). Frontend: Landing renders TR branding, login w/ admin@tubekit.app/admin123 redirects to /app, sidebar navigation to studio/seo/ideas works, SEO Yazar generated 5 titles + 3-paragraph description + 10 tags + hashtags in Turkish, Fikir Üretici returned 6 idea cards with title/hook/format/estimated_views, language toggle TR/EN switches UI text, dashboard shows counts (4 thumbs / 3 seo / 3 ideas) with recent thumbnails grid and recent activity list. AI Thumbnail generation visible in dashboard recent thumbnails (PY CAT image generated successfully).

issues: Browser tab title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'TubeKit' - update <title> in /app/frontend/public/index.html
Some saved thumbnails (the 1x1 png test seeds) render as black tiles; consider hiding tiny invalid thumbnails or filtering by min size on /api/thumbnail/list (cosmetic)

action_items: Update <title> tag in /app/frontend/public/index.html from 'Emergent | Fullstack App' to 'TubeKit'
(Optional) Hide or filter dummy/tiny thumbnails on dashboard/studio so editor placeholders don't show as black tiles
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 425 lines - acceptable for MVP but consider splitting routes (auth, seo, ideas, thumbnail) into modules as it grows past 700 lines

CORS uses allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True which browsers reject when credentials are sent; not an issue today because auth uses Bearer token in Authorization header (not cookies). If switching to httpOnly cookies later, must set explicit origins.
_id stripped correctly in /auth/me. Thumbnail/history list builders also avoid _id - good.
EmailStr in pydantic rejects reserved TLDs (.test/.example) - keep test fixtures using example.com.
Thumbnail generate uses gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview as specified; succeeded end-to-end in ~10-20s.
No password complexity or rate limiting on /auth/login - acceptable for MVP, flag for v2.
JWT_SECRET is hardcoded in committed .env - rotate before production.
test_credentials: admin@tubekit.app / admin123 (working). New users can register via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 admin user (auto by backend on startup), 2 dummy 1x1 png thumbnails via /thumbnail/save, 1 AI-generated thumbnail (PY CAT), 3 SEO history entries (Turkish + English), 3 idea sessions during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints fully working. Bearer token in Authorization header, stored client side as 'tk_token' in localStorage. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_tubekit.py can be re-run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_tubekit.py -v`. Avoid using .test/.example TLDs in EmailStr fields. Thumbnail generation takes ~10-25s. Frontend uses i18n with TR default; toggle at bottom of sidebar (and top-right on landing).
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. Only minor cosmetic items (HTML <title> and dashboard tiny-image rendering).
